def negative_prometheus_or_statsd_metric_emitted_inside_db_result_loop():
    rule_id = "prometheus_or_statsd_metric_emitted_inside_db_result_loop"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Prometheus counter or statsd metric emitted on every DB row in a result loop instead of once after."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
